block_00: Instinct vs Technical Analysis: What to choose?
block_01: Traders who use technical analysis can make up to 225% more than traders who rely on instinct. The choice is simple.
block_03: Let’s look at one of the most popular indicators, Bollinger Bands. This indicator is made up of three bands: the upper band, middle band, and lower band. Together, they measure volatility.
block_07: This indicator makes it easier to read market volatility, and is often used with the following strategy:
block_08: When the bands squeeze, the market has low volatility.
block_09: When the bands expand, the market has high volatility.
block_10: If bands contract, this is typically a sign that a breakout is coming.
block_11: To determine the direction of the breakout, you can look at the general trend. Test yourself using the chart below: in which direction will the breakout occur?
block_12: If you said downward, you are correct!
block_13: With this simple strategy, trader Manuel P tripled his investment and made a profit of $350!
block_15: Use the Bollinger Bands strategy and start making a profit today.
